name: EOSINOPHILIC CHOLANGIOPATHY
definition: rare benign cause of biliary obstruction

demographics.Histo: transmural eosinophilic infiltration of biliary tract

dominant_finding: thickened bile duct wall ± biliary dilatation
discriminating_features: thickened bile duct wall ± biliary dilatation

general: thickened bile duct wall ± biliary dilatation
